criteriaResults.evidence: Mocked stream yields two text deltas; callback join equals streamed.text; streamed response deep-equals the non-streaming create-path response incl. usage/stopReason/costUsd.
Streamed final message with tool_use block: no text deltas fire, toolCalls equal non-streaming normalization.
One no-op comment + one explicit test per adapter (openai/openai-compat/google/claude-code): spy never called, serialized request payload contains no 'onTextDelta'. 86 tests green across the 4 files.

DeltaRecordingClient confirms threading; ordered text-delta LoopEvents with correct turns; Object.hasOwn(lastParams,'onTextDelta')===false when unset; paired-run deep-equal; streamMock never called absent onTextDelta (createMock used).
erroringStream throws after partial delta -> adapter.chat rejects with same Error (not swallowed), create-throw parity; chatWithRetry/isTransientError untouched (verified by reading :183-220).
build + typecheck exit 0 fresh after all edits.

filesChanged.description: ChatParams.onTextDelta?: (delta: string) => void with adapters-MAY-ignore doc.

Extracted shared normalizeResponse(response, model, structured) (byte-identical to prior inline tail); requestBody built once (no stream key, satisfies both overloads without assertion); branch: create() unchanged path vs messages.stream() + per-delta try/catch callback + finalMessage() through the same normalizer.
streamMock + fakeStream/erroringStream helpers; 7 new tests incl. requestBody-shape parity between create and stream.
AgenticLoopParams.onTextDelta; per-turn emitTextDelta wrapper (inside turn loop, captures turn; safeEmit before caller callback) conditionally spread into chat params.
text-delta union member; RESERVED comment removed (all reserved names now implemented).
